name: Jura Energy Corporation
summary: Jura Energy Corporation, through its subsidiaries, engages in the development, exploration, and production of oil and gas properties. It holds working interests in three exploration licenses comprising Guddu, Zamzama North, and Sanjawi; and six leases consisting of Reti, Maru, Maru South, Zarghun South, Sara, and Suri covering a total area of 5,811.86 square kilometers located at various basins in Pakistan. The company is headquartered in Calgary, Canada. Jura Energy Corporation is a subsidiary of JS Energy Limited.
